name: Dendera Temple Complex
description: Dedicated to Hathor, Dendera is one of the most beautiful and well-preserved temples in Egypt. It is famous for its breathtaking ceiling, recently cleaned to reveal original vivid blue pigments and celestial depictions of zodiac signs. The iconic Hathoric columns give the hypostyle hall an unparalleled sense of grandeur. The complex also features underground crypts with mysterious reliefs and a replica of the famous Dendera Zodiac on the roof.
